About Me

Research-led.
Human-first.

🌿 Nature lover ✏️ Zentangle 🧵 Embroidery 🎨 Illustration

I'm Deepali — a Product Designer who sits at the intersection of research, strategy, and craft. With a foundation in Computer Engineering and over 6 years of experience, I bring both analytical rigor and creative intuition to every project.

I specialize in enterprise UX — the kind where the problems are messy, the stakeholders are many, and the impact is real. Whether it's unifying 12 regional healthcare websites or redesigning a warehouse admin portal that cut task time by 40%, I lead with curiosity and deliver with clarity.

My process is rooted in research: I listen before I sketch, validate before I ship, and always ask why before how.

Core Skills
User Research UX Strategy Design Systems Journey Mapping Information Architecture Stakeholder Management Heuristic Evaluation Competitive Analysis Persona Development Data-Driven Design
Tools
Figma Adobe XD Hotjar Miro Metabase GA Segment FigJam Notion
Experience

Virtusa
Senior UX Researcher / Product Designer

Grassdoor Logistic Technologies
UX Designer & Analyst
Led end-to-end redesign of an eCommerce admin portal — reducing task completion time by 20–40% and warehouse worker effort by 35–40%. Used Hotjar, Metabase & Google Analytics to drive decisions that boosted retention by 30% and cut drop-off rates by 50%. Kickstarted 5 new AI-driven projects.
eCommerce Warehouse UX AI/ML Analytics Design Systems
Jul 2019 – Apr 2021
Grassdoor (earlier role)
Junior Software Engineer → UX Designer
